title: fix bug of .dockerignore
body:
fix #699 
Exclude(or keep) files when bud with `ADD` or `COPY` in Dockerfile.

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: @QiWang19 did you test with the the scenario from #699?  I've tried but am having issues.  i think it's unrelated to your changes, but I'm not 100% sure.

I think it's working :thinking: 

```
[qiwan@qiwan dockerignore-master]$ sudo buildah bud .
STEP 1: FROM quay.io/quay/busybox:latest
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob f0a98344d604 [======================================] 1.4GiB / 1.4GiB
Copying blob 3eecc807f63d [======================================] 1.4GiB / 1.4GiB
Copying blob 48341aa39e69 [======================================] 1.4GiB / 1.4GiB
Copying blob 3eecc807f63d [======================================] 1.4GiB / 1.4GiB
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
STEP 2: ADD . /tmp/src
STEP 3: RUN ls -l /tmp/src
total 8
-rw-rw-r--    1 root     root            94 Feb  5 14:34 Dockerfile
-rw-rw-r--    1 root     root            12 Feb  5 14:34 source.txt
STEP 4: ENTRYPOINT ["/bin/bash"]
STEP 5: COMMIT containers-storage:[overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/var/run/containers/storage:overlay.mountopt=nodev]@174d00599bba8a22fcb16a29de3dc6d125dec65f6b77d0748a6e9b7ea264a27d
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob f62439784159 [======================================] 512b / 512b
Copying blob de4246eaeb69 [======================================] 2.0KiB / 2.0KiB
Copying blob 35725853fd5a [======================================] 2.7MiB / 2.7MiB
Copying blob de4246eaeb69 [======================================] 2.0KiB / 2.0KiB
Copying blob e9b0018bd17e [======================================] 5.0KiB / 5.0KiB
Copying config 24276f54ce [======================================] 1.4KiB / 1.4KiB
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
--> 174d00599bba8a22fcb16a29de3dc6d125dec65f6b77d0748a6e9b7ea264a27d
```

Test issues were apparently self-induced, it's working fine for me too @QiWang19 .  Thanks for double checking.
LGTM
